subject: [PATCH v10 04/15] userfaultfd: test uffd VMA flags through the vma_flags_t API

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch updates the userfaultfd VMA flag helpers to use the vma_flags_t accessor function, which is the recommended API for accessing these flags in a way that's aware of configuration-gated per-mode masks. The change does not introduce any functional changes, as the same bits are being read and the masks fold to the same code as before. This patch is part of a larger series of updates to userfaultfd.
